values.title: Welcome to Sentinel IT Solutions
values.hero_title: IT That Works While You Work
values.hero_description: Sentinel IT Solutions is your dedicated technology partner. We proactively manage, secure, and optimize your IT infrastructure so you can focus on growing your business.
values.cta_description: Schedule a free IT assessment and discover how Sentinel can reduce downtime, strengthen security, and lower your technology costs.

values.title: Managed IT Services
values.body:
Our fully managed IT services provide 24/7 monitoring, maintenance, and support for your entire technology stack. We act as your outsourced IT department, handling everything from patch management to strategic planning.

What's Included

  • 24/7 network and server monitoring
  • Automated patch management and updates
  • Proactive maintenance and health checks
  • Vendor management and procurement
  • Strategic IT roadmap planning
  • Monthly reporting and business reviews

image.alt: Server room with managed IT infrastructure

values.title: Cybersecurity & Compliance
values.body:
Protect your business from evolving cyber threats with our comprehensive security services. From endpoint protection to compliance auditing, we build layered defenses that keep your data safe.

Security Solutions

  • Endpoint Detection & Response (EDR)
  • Security Information & Event Management (SIEM)
  • Multi-factor authentication deployment
  • Security awareness training programs
  • Compliance auditing (HIPAA, PCI-DSS, SOC 2)
  • Incident response planning and tabletop exercises

values.title: Cloud Solutions & Migration
values.body:
Modernize your infrastructure with expert cloud services. Whether you're migrating to Microsoft 365, deploying Azure infrastructure, or building a hybrid cloud strategy, we guide you through every step.

Cloud Capabilities

  • Microsoft 365 deployment and management
  • Azure and AWS infrastructure design
  • Cloud migration planning and execution
  • Hybrid cloud architecture
  • Cloud backup and disaster recovery
  • Cost optimization and right-sizing

values.title: Help Desk & End-User Support
values.body:
Give your employees fast, friendly IT support whenever they need it. Our US-based help desk team resolves issues quickly so your team stays productive.

Support Features

  • Phone, email, and chat support channels
  • Remote troubleshooting and resolution
  • On-site support when needed
  • Self-service portal and knowledge base
  • New employee onboarding and offboarding
  • Hardware provisioning and setup

image.alt: IT support professional helping a client

values.title: Meridian Health - HIPAA-Compliant Cloud Migration
values.body:
Meridian Health, a regional healthcare provider with 12 clinics and 800 employees, needed to modernize their aging on-premises infrastructure while maintaining strict HIPAA compliance.

The Challenge

Meridian was running critical applications on end-of-life servers with no redundancy. Staff frequently experienced downtime, and the IT team was overwhelmed with reactive break-fix work.

Our Solution

  • Migrated 15 servers to Azure with HIPAA-compliant configuration
  • Deployed Microsoft 365 with Intune device management
  • Implemented EDR and SIEM for continuous security monitoring
  • Established disaster recovery with 1-hour RTO

Results

Within six months, Meridian reduced unplanned downtime by 94%, achieved full HIPAA compliance, and reduced IT costs by 30% compared to maintaining on-premises hardware.
values.results_summary: 94% reduction in downtime, HIPAA compliance achieved, 30% cost savings

values.title: Sterling Law Group - Zero Trust Security Transformation
values.body:
Sterling Law Group, a mid-size law firm handling sensitive litigation, experienced a phishing attack that compromised two employee accounts. They needed an immediate security overhaul.

The Challenge

The firm had minimal security infrastructure -- basic antivirus, no MFA, and employees using personal devices to access client files. Attorney-client privilege demanded the highest level of data protection.

Our Solution

  • Deployed zero trust network architecture
  • Implemented MFA across all applications and VPN access
  • Enrolled all devices in endpoint management with encryption
  • Conducted quarterly security awareness training

Results

In the 18 months since implementation, Sterling has experienced zero security incidents. They passed their first SOC 2 Type II audit and now use their security posture as a competitive differentiator when pitching to clients.
values.results_summary: Zero security incidents in 18 months, SOC 2 Type II certified

image.alt: Modern law office with secure workstations

values.title: Apex Manufacturing - IT Consolidation & Cost Reduction
values.body:
Apex Manufacturing, with 3 production facilities and 500 employees, was managing IT through a patchwork of local vendors and in-house staff with inconsistent results and rising costs.

The Challenge

Each facility had its own network design, different endpoint management tools, and no centralized monitoring. IT spend was growing 20% year-over-year with no improvement in service quality.

Our Solution

  • Consolidated all locations under a single managed services agreement
  • Standardized networking equipment and configuration
  • Deployed centralized monitoring and ticketing
  • Implemented SD-WAN for reliable inter-site connectivity

Results

Apex reduced annual IT spending by $180,000, improved network uptime to 99.98%, and freed their internal IT staff to focus on manufacturing-specific technology projects.

image.alt: Modern manufacturing facility with technology integration

values.title: David Park
values.body: David founded Sentinel IT Solutions in 2012 after spending 15 years in enterprise IT management. His vision was to bring enterprise-grade IT services to small and mid-size businesses at an accessible price point. Under his leadership, Sentinel has grown to serve over 350 businesses across the Midwest.

values.title: Rachel Kim
values.body: Rachel leads Sentinel's cybersecurity practice, bringing over a decade of experience from roles at Mandiant and CrowdStrike. She designs and implements security programs that protect our clients from the latest threats while keeping them compliant with industry regulations.

values.title: Marcus Thompson
values.body: Marcus oversees all cloud infrastructure projects at Sentinel. A certified Azure Solutions Architect and AWS Professional, he has led over 100 cloud migration projects ranging from small office setups to complex multi-cloud enterprise environments.

values.title: About Sentinel IT Solutions
values.body:
Sentinel IT Solutions is a managed service provider headquartered in Chicago, Illinois, serving small and mid-size businesses across the Midwest since 2012.

Our Approach

We believe IT should be proactive, not reactive. Our managed services model means we prevent problems before they impact your business, rather than waiting for things to break. Every client gets a dedicated account manager who understands their business and technology goals.

Why Sentinel?

  • Predictable Pricing - Fixed monthly fees with no surprise charges
  • US-Based Support - Our entire team is based in the United States
  • Industry Expertise - Deep experience in healthcare, legal, finance, and manufacturing
  • 24/7 Monitoring - We never sleep so your systems don't either
